description: Unique alphanumeric invoice identifier assigned by Oracle Fusion Receivables. Labeled 'Invoice Number' in the Invoice Details panel in the upper-right area of the document, directly below the title 'TAX INVOICE'. Format example: INV-2026-00483. Do not extract PO Number, Wire Reference, or any other reference codes.

Date the invoice was issued. Labeled 'Invoice Date' in the Invoice Details section, upper-right area. Format is DD-Mon-YYYY, for example 05-May-2026. Do not extract Due Date, Printed Date, or any other date fields.

Payment due date by which the invoice must be settled. Labeled 'Due Date' in the Invoice Details panel, upper-right section, typically displayed in red bold to signal urgency. Format is DD-Mon-YYYY, for example 04-Jun-2026. Do not extract Invoice Date or Printed Date.

Payment terms agreed between buyer and seller. Labeled 'Payment Terms' in the Invoice Details panel and also referenced in the Notes & Payment Terms section. Common values: Net 30, Net 60, Due on Receipt. Extract only the term code, for example 'Net 30'.
Currency code and full name for this invoice. Labeled 'Currency' in the Invoice Details panel, upper-right area. Format is ISO currency code followed by full name, for example 'USD – US Dollar'.
Oracle Fusion business unit responsible for the transaction. Labeled 'Business Unit' in the Invoice Details panel. Typically a short name such as 'US Primary BU'.
Type of Receivables transaction as defined in Oracle Fusion. Labeled 'Transaction Type' in the Invoice Details panel. Common values: Standard Invoice, Credit Memo, Debit Memo.
Buyer's purchase order reference number linked to this invoice. Labeled 'PO Number' in the Invoice Details panel. Format example: PO-2026-10293. Do not extract the Invoice Number.
Name of the salesperson or account manager associated with this invoice. Labeled 'Salesperson' in the Invoice Details panel. Extract the full name as printed.

Legal name of the customer being billed. Located in the Bill-To block in the upper-left section, directly under the 'BILL-TO' label. This is the first bold line in the block. Do not extract Ship-To or Remit-To name.

Full mailing address of the bill-to customer. Located in the Bill-To block, upper-left section, on the lines immediately following the customer name. May span multiple consecutive lines (street, suite, city, state, ZIP, country). Extract all adjacent address lines as a single concatenated value.
Tax registration or VAT number of the bill-to customer. Located inside the Bill-To address block, labeled 'Tax Reg #'. Format example: US-987654321.

Name of the ship-to location or entity. Located in the Ship-To block (middle panel of the upper section), directly under the 'SHIP-TO' label. This is the first bold line. Do not extract Bill-To or Remit-To names.

Full delivery address of the ship-to location. Located in the Ship-To block, on the lines following the ship-to name. May include building, street, city, state, ZIP, country, and an attention line. Extract all adjacent address lines as a single concatenated value.

Legal name of the entity to which payment should be remitted. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'Remit-To Name'. Distinct from the supplier brand name in the document header — extract the value adjacent to the Remit-To Name label.
Mailing address where payment should be sent. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'Remit-To Address'. Extract the full address as a single value.
Name of the bank for wire transfer or ACH payment. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'Bank Name', for example 'Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'.
Bank account number for payment. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'Account Number'. May be partially masked, for example 'XXXX-XXXX-4872'.
ABA routing number for ACH or wire transfers. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'ABA / Routing'. Nine-digit numeric value.
SWIFT/BIC code for international wire payments. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'SWIFT Code'. Format is 8–11 alphanumeric characters.

Reference string to include with wire transfer payments to ensure correct application. Located in the Remittance Information section, labeled 'Wire Reference'. Typically combines the invoice number and customer name.

Sequential line number for each row in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the first column ('#') of EVERY row in the table under the 'LINE ITEMS' section header. Return as a list preserving table order, for example ['1','2','3','4','5']. Do not extract rows from the Tax Details table.

Item or service description for each line in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the second column ('Item / Description') of EVERY row, including any product code or sub-detail printed on a second line within the same cell. Return as a list of strings preserving table order, with the same length and ordering as LineNumber. Do not include the column header text.

Unit of measure for each line in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the third column ('UOM') of EVERY row. Common values include EA, USR, CONN, ANN, HR, BOX. Return as a list preserving table order, with the same length and ordering as LineNumber.

Quantity for each line in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the fourth column ('Qty') of EVERY row. Return as a list of numeric values preserving table order, with the same length and ordering as LineNumber. Do not extract values from the Tax Details table.

Unit price (per UOM) for each line in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the fifth column ('Unit Price (USD)') of EVERY row. Return as a list of currency amounts preserving table order, with the same length and ordering as LineNumber. Do not extract the line Amount, Subtotal, or any tax amount.

Discount percentage applied at the line level for each row in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the sixth column ('Discount') of EVERY row, including the percent sign, for example '10.00%'. Return as a list preserving table order, with the same length and ordering as LineNumber. Do not extract Tax Rate % from the Tax Details table.

Net line amount (quantity × unit price minus line discount, excluding tax) for each row in the Line Items table. This field repeats once per line item — extract the value from the seventh and final column ('Amount (USD)') of EVERY row. Return as a list of currency amounts preserving table order, with the same length and ordering as LineNumber. Do not extract Subtotal, Tax Amount, or Total Amount Due from the summary section.

Tax regime for each tax line in the Tax Details table. This field repeats once per tax row — extract the value from the first column ('Tax Regime') of EVERY row in the Tax Details table. Return as a list preserving order, for example ['US Sales Tax','US Sales Tax']. Do not include the column header.

Specific tax name or jurisdiction for each tax line. This field repeats once per tax row — extract the value from the second column ('Tax Name') of EVERY row in the Tax Details table. Return as a list preserving order with the same length as TaxRegime.

Oracle Fusion tax rate code for each tax line. This field repeats once per tax row — extract the value from the third column ('Tax Rate Code') of EVERY row in the Tax Details table. Return as a list preserving order with the same length as TaxRegime.

Taxable amount upon which the tax for each tax line is calculated. This field repeats once per tax row — extract the value from the fourth column ('Taxable Amount (USD)') of EVERY row in the Tax Details table. Return as a list of currency amounts preserving order with the same length as TaxRegime. Do not confuse with the TaxableAmount field in the totals summary.

Tax rate percentage for each tax line. This field repeats once per tax row — extract the value from the fifth column ('Tax Rate %') of EVERY row in the Tax Details table, including the percent sign, for example '9.25%'. Return as a list preserving order with the same length as TaxRegime. Do not extract LineItemDiscountPercent.

Tax amount calculated for each tax line. This field repeats once per tax row — extract the value from the sixth and final column ('Tax Amount (USD)') of EVERY row in the Tax Details table. Return as a list of currency amounts preserving order with the same length as TaxRegime. Do not extract the aggregate TotalTaxAmount from the totals summary.

Sum of all line item amounts before tax and after line-level discounts. Labeled 'Subtotal' in the totals section at the bottom-right of the invoice. Format is USD followed by the numeric amount, for example 'USD 126,615.00'. Do not extract individual line amounts, tax amounts, or the total amount due.
Total discount amount aggregated across all line items. Labeled 'Discount Total' in the totals section, below Subtotal. Do not confuse with per-line discount percentages in the Line Items table.

Aggregate amount upon which taxes are calculated for the entire invoice. Labeled 'Taxable Amount' in the totals summary section. This is the invoice-level total; do not extract per-line taxable amounts (those are TaxLineTaxableAmount).

Total tax charged on the invoice, aggregating all tax regimes and jurisdictions. Labeled 'Tax Amount' in the totals summary section. This is the invoice-level total; do not extract per-line tax amounts (those are TaxLineAmount).

Grand total amount due from the customer, including all line items, discounts, and taxes. Labeled 'TOTAL AMOUNT DUE' in the summary section at the bottom-right, displayed in bold red text. This is the definitive payable amount, for example 'USD 138,643.43'. Do not extract SubTotal, TaxableAmount, or TotalTaxAmount.

Late payment penalty or interest rate applied to overdue balances. Located in the Notes & Payment Terms section, labeled 'Late Fee'. Typically a percentage per period, for example '1.5% per month on overdue balances'.

Email address to contact for billing disputes or invoice queries. Located in the Notes & Payment Terms section, labeled 'Dispute Process'. Extract only the email address (the substring matching the email pattern), not the surrounding instructional text.
Current status of the invoice as reported by Oracle Fusion Receivables. Located in the Notes & Payment Terms section, labeled 'Invoice Status'. Common values: OPEN, CLOSED, PARTIAL, CANCELLED.

Date and time the invoice document was generated or printed. Located in the footer at the very bottom of the page, following the label 'Printed:'. Includes both date and time, for example '05-May-2026 09:14 AM PST'. Do not extract Invoice Date or Due Date.
Oracle Fusion Receivables transaction source indicating how the invoice was created. Located in the document footer, following 'Transaction Source:'. Common values: Manual, AutoInvoice, Imported.
Name or role of the person who authorized the invoice. Located in the footer, following 'Authorized by:'. For example 'AR Manager'. Do not extract the salesperson name.
